_comment: Manifest of eval-sets published on labs.intentsolutions.io. Hand-edited for static fields (id, title, description, predicate_uri, predecessor, status). Volatile fields (version, last_changed_at) are refreshed by scripts/regenerate.py on the daily cron from upstream source.

eval_sets.title: j-rig binary-criteria skill evaluation, 7 layers
eval_sets.short_description: Score every Claude skill yes/no across seven layers — package integrity, trigger quality, functional quality, regression protection, baseline value, model variance, rollout safety. Never gradients. The eval-set that gives this platform its name.

scorecards.title: Evidence Bench — j-rig-bench scorecard
scorecards.short_description: Signed, reproducible AI eval results. Each row is built to ship as a sigstore-signed, Rekor-anchored Evidence Bundle — reproducibility via signature, not just transparency. First row: Skill Refiner Phase A.0 (PROCEED). Complements gbrain-evals on an orthogonal dimension; does not restate it.

queued_for_v0_2_0.title: audit-harness deterministic gate-set
queued_for_v0_2_0.short_description: escape-scan, CRAP score, architecture rules, bias count, Gherkin lint. The infrastructure layer underneath every IEP repo.

queued_for_v0_2_0.title: Skill Refiner Phase A.0 baseline eval-set
queued_for_v0_2_0.short_description: The null-hypothesis spec that gates Skill Refiner Phase A. Pre-registered ahead of the run per DR-028.
